_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Facilitate the sharing of “best practices” and “lessons learned” throughout the cyber operations community.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge sharing forums, best practice documentation, cross-team collaboration initiatives, and capability building activities.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.429), DG-T-009 (DG, cosine: 0.425).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.683). Shared vocabulary: [best, sharing]. DCWF-only terms [community, cyber, facilitate, learned, lessons, operations] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, building, capability, collaboration, communities] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.883, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Facilitate the sharing of “best practices” and “lessons learned” throughout the" and "Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.490 < STS 0.683 (gap -0.194). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [community, cyber, facilitate] and [activities, ai, building] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [best, sharing]. DCWF-only: [community, cyber, facilitate, learned, lessons, operations]. WIDAI-only: [activities, ai, building, capability, collaboration, communities].
